steps.title: Find the area of Circle N
steps.content: Circle N has radius 7 mm. Use the area formula with $r = 7$: $$A_N = \pi(7)^2 = 49\pi \text{ mm}^2$$

steps.title: Add both areas to find the total
steps.content: Circle M's area is $64\pi$ mm² (given). Adding Circle N and Circle M: $$49\pi + 64\pi = 113\pi \text{ mm}^2$$ That matches choice A — A is correct.
